plain_name: Dip-depth memory curve-fit tau vs wait time
input_object: Dip_depth vs tw per Tp (Track B consolidation)
builder_rule: Trusted positive component taus from logistic half-time stretched-exp half-time half-range; tau_effective_seconds = 10^median(log10 of trusted components) per code path
required_disclosures: tau_domain; tau_method; tau_input_object=Dip_depth; producer_script; source_artifact=tau_vs_Tp.csv; source_run or lineage_status; grain; units; builder_rule; tau_consensus_methods (trusted_component_tau_fields); consolidation source_run ties to observable dataset
allowed_display_name: tau vs Tp (dip) with full tau bundle row
forbidden_display_name: tau_effective_seconds standalone or dip tau without domain/method
notes: Canonical closure label; logical display tau_Dip_depth_curvefit; aging_tau_metadata_gate_01 inventory used token DIP_MEMORY_CURVEFIT — preserve mapping when joining legacy rows.

plain_name: FM magnitude curve-fit tau vs wait time
input_object: FM_abs vs tw per Tp (Track B consolidation)
input_artifact: aging_observable_dataset.csv plus tau_vs_Tp.csv and cfg dip-branch diagnostics paths
builder_rule: half_range_seconds primary when half-range status ok else same log-median consensus pattern as dip trusted set
required_disclosures: tau_domain; tau_method; tau_input_object=FM_abs; FM_abs ABS_ONLY disclosure; producer_script; source_artifact=tau_FM_vs_Tp.csv; source_run or lineage_status; grain; units; builder_rule; tau_consensus_methods or half_range_primary flag; dip tau file linkage per cfg
allowed_display_name: tau_FM vs Tp with full tau bundle row
forbidden_display_name: tau_effective_seconds standalone or FM tau without ABS_ONLY + domain
notes: FM_abs is ABS_ONLY magnitude-only input to fits per F7X5 / user-guide routing; differs algorithmically from dip when half_range_primary applies.
